collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (5 total Queries, 5 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT `cs`.*, `p`.`title`, `p`.`handle`, `p`.`price`, `p`.`compare_price`, `p`.`is_in_stock`, `p`.`vendor`, (SELECT pm.path FROM product_media pm WHERE pm.product_id = p.id AND pm.is_cover = 1 LIMIT 1) as cover_image FROM `cart_sessions` `cs` JOIN `products` `p` ON `p`.`id` = `cs`.`product_id` WHERE `p`.`is_active` = 1 AND `p`.`deleted_at` IS NULL AND `cs`.`session_id` = '2b69e830994a11a8980191a0a70300a7' ORDER BY `cs`.`created_at` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `cs`.*, `p`.`title`, `p`.`handle`, `p`.`price`, `p`.`compare_price`, `p`.`is_in_stock`, `p`.`vendor`, (SELECT pm.path FROM product_media pm WHERE pm.product_id = p.id AND pm.is_cover = 1 LIMIT 1) as cover_image FROM `cart_sessions` `cs` JOIN `products` `p` ON `p`.`id` = `cs`.`product_id` WHERE `p`.`is_active` = 1 AND `p`.`deleted_at` IS NULL AND `cs`.`session_id` = '2b69e830994a11a8980191a0a70300a7' ORDER BY `cs`.`created_at` ASC
